model: claude-haiku-4.5, claude-opus-4.6, claude-sonnet-4.6, gemini-3-pro-preview, gpt-5-mini, gpt-5.1-codex-mini, gpt-5.2, gpt-5.3-codex

decision.webServer: Next.js 15 App Router on Vercel with Edge Functions
Next.js (13+ with ISR/SSG) deployed on Vercel Edge + Cloudflare CDN
FastAPI (hosted via AWS API Gateway + Lambda)

decision.database: Apache CouchDB (with PouchDB clients for offline-first sync)

decision.runtime: Node.js 22 (with built-in support for event-driven resilience)
decision.language: TypeScript (for consistent typing across client and sync services)
decision.webServer: Fastify (lightweight, support for HTTP/2, resilience hooks, and good plugin ecosystem)
decision.database: Apache CouchDB (distributed, offline-first replication with deterministic conflict resolution)

decision.runtime: AWS Lambda with AWS Step Functions
decision.webServer: AWS API Gateway with Mutual TLS
decision.database: Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL with IAM authentication

decision.runtime: Amazon EKS (Kubernetes) with AWS IoT Core for resilient device ingestion
AWS Fargate on EKS with AWS IoT integration
decision.webServer: FastAPI with Uvicorn behind AWS App Mesh
decision.database: Amazon Timestream with DynamoDB for metadata

decision.webServer: Next.js App Router running on Vercel or Cloud Run
